description_long: This bungalow features a modern, open-plan layout with a combination of white exterior walls and warm wooden interior accents. The front facade is characterized by two prominent bay windows flanking a central entrance, providing ample natural light to the main living areas. Inside, the space is divided into a living room, dining area, and a staircase leading to a partial upper level, all visible through large interior openings. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front. The interior furnishings include a sofa, dining table, chairs, and a television, suggesting a comfortable residential environment. The structure is compact, single-story, and designed for urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white exterior, bay windows, and warm wooden interior accents. Features an open-plan living space and symmetrical front window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing two bay windows, the main entrance, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior with wooden accents.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the living room, partial staircase, and more of the open interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a focus on the back wall and dining area.
description_view_3: Top-down rear-side view highlighting the flat roof and the staircase leading to the partial upper level.
